language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Switch the interface language
language.description: Choose the language used by the application interface. Changes take effect immediately.

dataStorage.title: Data Storage Location
dataStorage.subtitle: Set where the database and thumbnails are stored
dataStorage.customHint: The database and thumbnails will be stored here. Leave empty to use the default location.
dataStorage.toastSaved: Settings saved. Please restart the app to use the new storage location.
dataStorage.toastReset: Restored to default. Please restart the app.
dataStorage.confirmChange:
Changing the data storage location requires a restart to take effect.

Save now?
dataStorage.confirmReset:
Restore the default storage location?
A restart is required to take effect.

trash.title: Trash
trash.subtitle: How the two-level trash works
trash.description: The app creates a hidden folder {{folder}} at the root of each disk where the original photos live. Deleted photos are moved here first.
trash.step1: Click "Delete" in the app: photos move to the app trash (hidden folder).
trash.step2: Click "Delete Permanently" in the trash: photos move to the system recycle bin.
trash.step3: Only after emptying the system recycle bin are photos truly removed from disk.
trash.note: On Windows this folder has the hidden attribute; on macOS/Linux it is hidden by the leading dot.

log.title: Log Settings
log.subtitle: Configure log storage location and view logs
log.customHint: Log files will be stored in this directory. Leave empty to use the default location.
log.logViewHint: View, refresh, or clear application logs

map.title: Map Settings
map.subtitle: Configure map tile provider and API key
map.coordTransformHint: This provider uses the GCJ02 coordinate system; photo coordinates are automatically converted from WGS84.
map.toastSaved: Map settings saved. Switch to the Map page to take effect.

providers.tianditu: Tianditu (requires API Key + auto coordinate offset)

cache.title: Cache Management
cache.subtitle: Clear cache to free up disk space
cache.thumbnailHint: Thumbnails will be regenerated on next browse after clearing
cache.confirmClear:
Clear all thumbnail cache?
Thumbnails will be regenerated on next browse.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.subtitle: These actions are irreversible. Proceed with caution.
danger.clearDatabaseHint: Deletes all photo records, folders, and duplicate detection results. Requires re-scanning.
danger.confirmClear1:
Clear all data?

This will delete all photo records, folders, and duplicate detection results.
This action is irreversible!
danger.confirmClear2:
Confirm again: this will delete all records in the database and requires re-scanning folders.

Continue?
danger.toastCleared: Database cleared. Please re-add folders and scan.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: xd-PhotoVault - A simple, capable photo management tool
about.description: A desktop app focused on local photo management, smart deduplication, and map browsing. Supports timeline browsing, AI semantic search, duplicate detection, and geographic visualization. All photo data is stored locally to protect your privacy.

library.pageSubtitle: Manage your photo folders, scan and build the index

scan.toastBusy: A folder is already scanning. Please wait for it to finish.
scan.confirmForceRescan: Force re-scan will clear all indexes for this folder and scan again. Continue?

ai.title: AI Semantic Index
ai.description: Once indexed, you can search photo content semantically. Indexing runs in the background and can be paused anytime.
ai.gpuToggleDesc: When enabled, uses DirectML to index via the GPU. Falls back to CPU automatically on failure.

empty.title: No folders added yet
empty.description: After adding a photo folder, xd-PhotoVault will scan and build an index so you can browse, search, and manage photos easily.

folder.toastConflictChild: This folder is already included in "{{path}}". No need to add it again.
folder.toastTrashFolder: Cannot add the app trash folder (.xd-photovault-trash) as a library folder.
folder.confirmRemove: Remove this folder? Photo indexes will be deleted, but the original files will not be deleted.

empty.aiDescription: Try a different keyword, or make sure AI indexing is complete
empty.browseDescription: Add and scan a folder in the Library first

toast.batchLocationFailed: Failed to set location in batch:
toast.confirmMoveToTrash:
Move {{count}} selected photos to trash?

You can restore or permanently delete them from the trash.

duplicates.tip: Tip: click a card to select, Shift+click for range, ? for shortcuts

detail.noGps: This photo has no GPS data

card.unkeepTitle: Not kept (click to mark as keep)
card.footerHint: Exact duplicate groups keep only one photo; similar duplicate groups can keep multiple. Photos not marked as keep will be deleted. The "Recommended" tag indicates the system-recommended photo to keep.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.rangeSelect: Range select (from last click to current)
shortcuts.footer: Click outside or press Esc to close

toast.scanBusy: A scan is in progress. Please wait for it to finish before running duplicate detection.
toast.alreadyRunning: Duplicate detection is already running. Don't click again.
toast.needKeep: At least one photo must be kept per group
toast.needSelect: Please select duplicate groups to process first
toast.noDeletable: No deletable photos in this group
toast.keepProtected: This photo is marked as keep and cannot be deleted

confirm.exactDetect: This will re-detect all exactly identical photos (based on file content hash). Continue?
confirm.similarDetect:
Similar deduplication computes a perceptual hash for each photo and compares visual similarity. With many photos this can take hours.

Recommended to run when you don't need the app. Continue?
confirm.deleteBatch:
Delete {{count}} duplicate photos?
Files will be moved to the trash.
confirm.deleteGroup:
Delete {{count}} duplicate photos in this group?
Files will be moved to the trash.

map.emptyNoLocationDesc: Photos need GPS data to be displayed on the map
map.emptyViewportTitle: No photos in the current viewport
map.emptyViewportDesc: Move or zoom the map to see more locations

empty.title: Trash is empty
empty.description: Deleted photos are held here temporarily. Emptying moves them to the system recycle bin.

toast.emptied: Trash emptied. {{count}} photos moved to the system recycle bin.

confirm.permanentDelete:
Permanently delete {{count}} selected photos?

They will be moved to the system recycle bin and can be restored from there.
confirm.emptyAll:
Empty the trash?

All photos will be moved to the system recycle bin and can be restored from there.

photoDetail.noGps: This photo has no GPS data

toast.invalidCoords: Please enter valid latitude and longitude

trashPrompt.message:
Deleted photos are held in the app trash. You can restore or permanently delete them anytime.

Only after clicking "Delete Permanently" in the trash will photos move to the system recycle bin.

To change the trash location, go to "Settings".
